<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band13_chunk008.pdf#page=23 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band13 p394 -->

REBDOR

<!-- header: REBDOR -->


[[File:Band13_chunk008_p023_img001.jpg|thumb|Das Mittelschiff nach Osten]]



[[File:Band13_chunk008_p023_img002.jpg|thumb]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band13 p395 -->


RFNDO
